title: How can I sell more items on Back Market if there’s a sales limit?
bodyHtml:
Our goal is to make sure you’re able to cope with large numbers of sales while maintaining our quality expectations.
 
We’ve set up quality control points for you to target when you hit key daily sales numbers. If you can deliver the volume of sales while maintaining good quality metrics, only then will you be authorized to sell more.
 

What’s the daily sales limit?


After the launch phase, Sellers start with a daily sales limit of 25. 

 

Once you hit 20+ sales in a day and provided that your quality metrics (i.e., Defective rate over 90 days and Appearance rate over 30 days) remain below fixed targets (i.e. average rates of active Sellers), your limit will be increased to 50 sales per day. 

 

We check every 2 weeks. If we notice that you’ve hit the 20+ sales per day and the quality metrics are compliant, we increase the daily sales limit by an additional 25 sales per day. 

 

If you’ve reached your sales limit, the information will be available on the homepage of your Back Office.

 

What are the quality targets to hit to increase your  sales limits?

To unblock the growth of your daily sales, you need to respect the following targets: 

 

  • Appearance: below the average rate of active Sellers over 30 days
  • Defective: below the average rate of active Sellers over 90 days. 
  • To track your quality performance, check out your Quality Insights Dashboard.
